_meta.note: Schema v1 format — issues are strings. v2 (object[] with severity) introduced in 0.3.0.

issues: scope_coherence: Conceptual lifecycle states (open, agent_assigned, handed_off) are used in descriptions but not mapped to persisted enum values (active, pending_handoff, closed). A builder cannot determine which vocabulary to implement.
scope_coherence: Module boundary not explicitly defined — unclear which layers own state transitions.
